subcodes.first_line: O Nasru'lláh! The victory hath come, while the people remain in manifest veils. The Day hath indeed come, yet the people remain in grievous error [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نصرالله قد اتی النصر و القوم فی حجاب مبین قد اتی الیوم و القوم فی ضلال عظیم
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @knowledge; recognition of God
